'''ây-f-zh''' ('''kayafazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monstrate|monstrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monstrate|monstrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-f-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kayafazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyafazh|thiyafazh]] || [[word:jiyafazh|jiyafazh]] || [[word:shiyafazh|shiyafazh]] || [[word:kiyafazh|kiyafazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyafazh|thuthuyafazh]] || [[word:jujuyafazh|jujuyafazh]] || [[word:shushuyafazh|shushuyafazh]] || [[word:kukuyafazh|kukuyafazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyafazh|thuyafazh]] || [[word:juyafazh|juyafazh]] || [[word:shuyafazh|shuyafazh]] || [[word:kuyafazh|kuyafazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyafazh|thuyafazh]] || [[word:juyafazh|juyafazh]] || [[word:shuyafazh|shuyafazh]] || [[word:kuyafazh|kuyafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyafazh|theyafazh]] || [[word:jeyafazh|jeyafazh]] || [[word:sheyafazh|sheyafazh]] || [[word:keyafazh|keyafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyafazh|thothoyafazh]] || [[word:jojoyafazh|jojoyafazh]] || [[word:shoshoyafazh|shoshoyafazh]] || [[word:kokoyafazh|kokoyafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyafazh|thoyafazh]] || [[word:joyafazh|joyafazh]] || [[word:shoyafazh|shoyafazh]] || [[word:koyafazh|koyafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyafazh|thoyafazh]] || [[word:joyafazh|joyafazh]] || [[word:shoyafazh|shoyafazh]] || [[word:koyafazh|koyafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyafazh|thĂŠyafazh]] || [[word:jĂŠyafazh|jĂŠyafazh]] || [[word:shĂŠyafazh|shĂŠyafazh]] || [[word:kĂŠyafazh|kĂŠyafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayafazh|thathayafazh]] || [[word:jajayafazh|jajayafazh]] || [[word:shashayafazh|shashayafazh]] || [[word:kakayafazh|kakayafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayafazh|thayafazh]] || [[word:jayafazh|jayafazh]] || [[word:shayafazh|shayafazh]] || [[word:kayafazh|kayafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayafazh|thayafazh]] || [[word:jayafazh|jayafazh]] || [[word:shayafazh|shayafazh]] || [[word:kayafazh|kayafazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayafazh|shayafazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayafazh|goshayafazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayafazh|gokishayafazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayafazhnĂŒ|shayafazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayafazhnknĂŒ|goshayafazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafazhnĂŒ|gokishayafazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayafazhshĂ«|shayafazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkshĂ«|goshayafazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayafazhshĂ«|gokishayafazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafazhro|shayafazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkro|goshayafazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafazhro|gokishayafazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafazhmu|shayafazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkmu|goshayafazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafazhmu|gokishayafazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayafazhsher|shayafazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayafazhnksher|goshayafazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayafazhsher|gokishayafazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayafazhng|shayafazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkng|goshayafazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayafazhng|gokishayafazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayafazhya|shayafazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkya|goshayafazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayafazhya|gokishayafazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayafazhyam|shayafazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkyam|goshayafazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayafazhyam|gokishayafazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayafazhnĂŒshĂ«|shayafazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayafazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayafazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayafazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayafazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafazhnĂŒro|shayafazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafazhnknĂŒro|goshayafazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafazhnĂŒro|gokishayafazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafazhnĂŒmu|shayafazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafazhnknĂŒmu|goshayafazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafazhnĂŒmu|gokishayafazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayafazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shayafazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayafazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayafazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafazhshĂ«ro|shayafazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkshĂ«ro|goshayafazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafazhshĂ«ro|gokishayafazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafazhshĂ«mu|shayafazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkshĂ«mu|goshayafazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafazhshĂ«mu|gokishayafazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayafazhronĂŒ|shayafazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkronĂŒ|goshayafazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafazhronĂŒ|gokishayafazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayafazhroshĂ«|shayafazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkroshĂ«|goshayafazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayafazhroshĂ«|gokishayafazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafazhromu|shayafazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkromu|goshayafazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafazhromu|gokishayafazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayafazhmunĂŒ|shayafazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkmunĂŒ|goshayafazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafazhmunĂŒ|gokishayafazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayafazhmushĂ«|shayafazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkmushĂ«|goshayafazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayafazhmushĂ«|gokishayafazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafazhmuro|shayafazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafazhnkmuro|goshayafazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafazhmuro|gokishayafazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
